title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Columbia Asia Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Columbia Asia Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
We at Columbia Asia Advisory Limited are looking for an experienced Radiologist based out of Mumbai. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Columbia Asia Advisory Limited:
Columbia Asia Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Columbia Asia Advisory Limited!
